utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear with corresponding entries. Each includes required details: health_coverage specifies costs and coverage details; property_coverage specifies cost, coverage scope, itemized high-value contents, address, and property value; travel_coverage specifies cost and coverage features; additional_services lists included services and optional add-ons with costs; total_budget provides monthly total, comparison to current spend, monthly and annual savings, and timing. All items are fully specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific products by name: LifeFirst Standard Physical Health with Mental Health, EliteHome Premium Coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan. We must match each named item to the exact corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings and return their ratings. For health, the plan combines LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) and LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health), so we map both. For property, EliteHome Premium Coverage matches directly under home_content. For travel, PrimeTravel Premium Plan matches directly under travel_insurance.
